title: `MaterializeAtSHA` — replay op log at arbitrary historical commit
definition_of_done: MaterializeAtSHA(sha) returns materialized state as of that commit; unit tests pass with real git fixtures

acceptance.description: MaterializeAtSHA returns correct state as of given commit

outcome: MaterializeAtSHA(gc, sha, opsPrefix) implemented; replays op log at arbitrary commit; unit tests with real git fixtures pass; make check green

notes.msg: MaterializeAtSHA implemented in internal/materialize/atsha.go; 4 tests pass; make check green
